description: Micro HDMI Type D SMD receptacle, 19-pin, right-angle, Molex 47053-1001 — compact HDMI for space-constrained designs

pins.name: DDC_SCL
pins.description: DDC/EDID I2C Clock (connect to TC358870 DDCSCL)

pins.name: DDC_SDA
pins.description: DDC/EDID I2C Data (connect to TC358870 DDCSDA)

pins.name: HDMI_5V
pins.description: +5V from HDMI source. Use 47kΩ+10kΩ divider to TC358870 HDMI_5V pin.

pins.name: HPD
pins.description: Hot Plug Detect — connect to TC358870 HPD output via 1kΩ

pins.name: SHIELD
pins.description: Connector shield — connect to GND plane

pins.name: SHIELD
pins.description: Connector shield — connect to GND plane

notes: Micro HDMI (Type D) chosen for board size constraint (<43×27mm). Shield pins (S1, S2) must be soldered to GND. TMDS shield pins (2,5,8,11) connect to GND plane. Route TMDS pairs as 100Ω differential, matched length ±5mil. Pin 14 (Reserved) leave NC. HPD pull-up: 100kΩ to 5V via 1kΩ series resistor from TC358870 HPD pin.
